summary: Completed testing of Market Intelligence Center and Newsletter System. All 17 backend API tests pass. Frontend components render correctly - Market Intelligence page shows live crypto data, Fear & Greed index, and news. Newsletter signup on homepage works. Admin Newsletter tab is fully functional with create/list/send capabilities.

minor.issue: CoinGecko API rate limited - only returns fear_greed when rate limited, market cap data missing. Mock data fallback works correctly.
Returns 404 - notification count endpoint not found (cosmetic, not blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Newsletter email sending is MOCKED when RESEND_API_KEY is placeholder - emails marked as sent but not actually delivered
Newsletter subscribers stored in-memory (not MongoDB) - will be lost on server restart. Consider persisting to database for production
seed_data_creation: Created test newsletter subscribers and newsletters via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Market Intelligence and Newsletter features are fully functional. Newsletter sending is mocked (no Resend API key). CoinGecko API may be rate limited - mock data fallback works.

market_intelligence_api.GET /api/market/cryptos: PASS - Returns crypto list with prices, market cap, sparklines
market_intelligence_api.GET /api/market/global: PASS - Returns fear & greed index (market cap may be rate limited)

newsletter_api.POST /api/newsletter/subscribe: PASS - Subscribes email with language preference

frontend_market_intelligence.details: Page shows Market Cap ($2.40T), 24h Volume ($89.00B), BTC Dominance (52.3%), Fear & Greed (11 - Extreme Fear), Top Cryptocurrencies list, tabs for Market/Watchlist/Alerts/News/AI Insights

frontend_newsletter_signup.details: Homepage shows 'Stay Ahead of the Market' section with email input and Subscribe Free button

frontend_admin_newsletter.details: Admin Newsletter tab shows stats (4 subscribers, 2 newsletters, 1 sent), create form with language selector, AI generation button, subject/content inputs

mocked_apis.newsletter_sending: MOCKED - Resend API key is placeholder, emails marked as sent but not delivered
mocked_apis.crypto_news: MOCKED - Returns curated mock news articles
